content:
## Project Overview
React portfolio website with multiple components (Navbar, Hero, About, Experience, Services, Portfolio, Contact, Footer). Routing and project detail/listing pages have been fully implemented. Main page (Portfolio.jsx) updated to show 6 projects in a 3-3 grid layout. Contact/Vala section UI redesign is complete. Footer component has been created and updated. Mobile responsiveness work is complete for all main components. Navbar hamburger menu close button fix is complete. Hero section scroll-down arrow position fix was in progress. ProjectDetail page scroll-to-top fix is now complete (ScrollToTop component added to App.jsx). Dev server is running and ScrollToTop fix is confirmed in place.

## Completed Work
- Portfolio.css has been created/modified
- Navbar.css has been created/modified
- Hero.jsx, About.jsx, Experience.jsx, Services.jsx components exist
- react-router-dom has been installed (package.json was modified)
- `src/data/projects.js` has been created (shared project data source with 12 projects — fully updated)
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.jsx` has been created
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.css` has been created
- `src/pages/AllProjects.jsx` has been created
- `src/pages/AllProjects.css` has been created
- Portfolio.jsx has been updated with View Project links and View More button
- App.jsx has been updated with router and routes
- Portfolio.css updated with "View More" button styles
- All original todo items marked completed; project was fully implemented
- Portfolio.jsx updated to show 6 projects (instead of 5) in a 3-3 grid layout (2 rows × 3 columns)
- Contact/Vala section UI redesign initiated — agent decided on a modern two-column layout (left: contact info cards, right: form)
- Contact.jsx has been rewritten with new two-column layout
- Contact.css has been rewritten/modified to style the two-column layout
- User reported issue: the form card (red box area) is being vertically centered in the middle of its side's section height — fix applied to make the form card match the full height of the left column
- Contact.css was recently modified (as of 6/30/2026, 12:38 PM IST)
- Contact.jsx was recently modified (as of 6/30/2026, 12:42 PM IST)
- User requested a modern Footer component ("Footer thoduk morder banavine apo")
- Footer.jsx has been created (modern multi-row layout — logo + nav links + social icons + copyright bar) (as of 6/30/2026, 12:44 PM IST)
- Footer.css has been created (modern footer styles) (as of 6/30/2026, 12:44 PM IST)
- GitHub button removed from Footer.jsx (as of 6/30/2026, 12:45 PM IST)
- Footer copyright line centered and "Built with React & Vite" text removed from Footer.jsx (as of 6/30/2026, 12:47 PM IST)
- User requested full mobile responsiveness for the entire website — agent completed comprehensive audit and fix of all CSS files
- Hero.css, About.css, Services.css, Experience.css, Portfolio.css, Contact.css, Footer.css, index.css — all mobile responsiveness fixes completed (as of 6/30/2026, 1:28–1:34 PM IST)
- Download CV button text + icon color fixed to white in About.css (as of 7/6/2026, 11:17 AM IST)
- Navbar hamburger menu transparent background fix applied to Navbar.css (as of 7/6/2026, ~11:27 AM IST)
- Navbar hamburger menu close (×) button added inside mobile menu drawer — fix applied to Navbar.jsx and Navbar.css (as of 7/6/2026, ~11:29 AM IST)
- Hero section scroll-down arrow position fix was in progress (as of 7/6/2026, 11:31 AM IST)
- User reported: clicking "View Project" on any project card opens the ProjectDetail page scrolled to the bottom instead of the top — ScrollToTop fix needed in App.jsx (as of 7/6/2026, 11:32 AM IST)
- ScrollToTop component added to App.jsx using `useEffect` + `useLocation` — calls `window.scrollTo(0, 0)` instantly on route change (no animation) (as of 7/6/2026, 11:34 AM IST)
- User confirmed the fix should work without scrolling animation — page must open at top immediately on redirect
- Dev server confirmed running at 11:36 AM IST; ScrollToTop fix confirmed in place in App.jsx — agent instructed user to test by clicking "View Project" on any project card

## Key Technical Decisions
- Using React with component-based architecture
- CSS modules per component (e.g., Navbar.css, Portfolio.css)
- Using react-router-dom for routing (installed and configured)
- Model in use: claude-sonnet-4-6 (Coding mode)
- Shared project data file (`src/data/projects.js`) as single source of truth for all project data
- Pages are placed in `src/pages/` directory
- AllProjects page to display 12 projects in a 3-3-3-3 grid layout (4 rows × 3 columns)
- Portfolio.jsx (home section) shows 6 projects in a 3-3 grid (2 rows × 3 columns); AllProjects shows all 12
- Contact/Vala section redesign approach: modern two-column layout — left column with contact info cards, right column with the contact form
- Contact form card (right column) should stretch to match the full height of the left column — use `align-items: stretch` on the grid container and `height: 100%` on the form wrapper
- Footer design approach: modern multi-row layout — top section with logo + nav links + social icons, bottom bar with copyright
- Footer social icons: GitHub button has been removed; only remaining social icons are kept
- Footer copyright bar: text is centered; "Built with React & Vite" line has been removed
- Mobile responsiveness: full audit and fix of all component CSS files required — no structural JSX changes preferred, only CSS media queries and responsive adjustments
- index.css global mobile improvements: better font scaling, tap target sizes, prevent text overflow
- Download CV button: text color and download icon color must both be white (fixed in About.css)
- Navbar hamburger menu: mobile dropdown must have solid (non-transparent) background — fixed in Navbar.css
- Navbar hamburger menu close button: a dedicated × close button added inside the mobile menu drawer (upper right corner), because the hamburger button is hidden behind the menu overlay (z-index conflict); fix required JSX change in Navbar.jsx + CSS in Navbar.css
- Hero scroll-down arrow: user wants it positioned lower/further down — fix via Hero.css (adjust bottom or margin/padding of the arrow element)
- ProjectDetail page scroll-to-top: React Router does not scroll to top on navigation by default — fix by adding a `ScrollToTop` component in App.jsx that calls `window.scrollTo(0, 0)` on route change using `useEffect` + `useLocation`; NO scroll animation — page must instantly appear at top

## Relevant Files & Code
- `src/components/Navbar.jsx` — ✅ Close (×) button added inside mobile menu drawer
- `src/components/Navbar.css` — ✅ Solid background applied; ✅ Close button styles added
- `src/components/Portfolio.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed
- `src/components/Hero.jsx` — Hero section component
- `src/components/Hero.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed; 🔄 Scroll-down arrow position fix in progress (needs to move lower)
- `src/components/About.jsx` — About section component
- `src/components/About.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed; ✅ Download CV button text + icon color set to white
- `src/components/Experience.jsx` — Experience section component
- `src/components/Experience.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed
- `src/components/Services.jsx` — Services section component
- `src/components/Services.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed
- `src/components/Portfolio.jsx` — ✅ Updated to show 6 projects in 3-3 grid layout
- `src/App.jsx` — ✅ Updated with router, routes, and ScrollToTop component (window.scrollTo(0,0) on route change, no animation); fix confirmed in place as of 7/6/2026 11:36 AM IST
- `package.json` — Recently modified (react-router-dom added)
- `src/data/projects.js` — ✅ Complete with 12 projects
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.jsx` — ✅ Created
- `src/pages/ProjectDetail.css` — ✅ Created; 🔄 needs mobile responsive fix
- `src/pages/AllProjects.jsx` — 🔄 Needs update to render all 12 projects in 3-3-3-3 grid
- `src/pages/AllProjects.css` — 🔄 Needs CSS grid update for 3-column layout + mobile responsive fix
- `src/components/Contact.jsx` — ✅ Rewritten with new two-column layout
- `src/components/Contact.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed
- `src/components/Footer.jsx` — ✅ Updated (GitHub removed, copyright centered, "Built with React & Vite" removed); ✅ mobile responsive fix completed
- `src/components/Footer.css` — ✅ Mobile responsiveness fixed
- `src/index.css` — ✅ Global styles mobile fix completed

## Current Status
Session active on 7/6/2026 at 11:36 AM IST. VSCode visible file: App.jsx. Open tabs: Contact.jsx, Navbar.jsx, Navbar.css, Hero.css, App.jsx. Dev server is running (`npm run dev`). Session cost: $14.81. ScrollToTop component is confirmed in place in App.jsx — agent instructed user to test by clicking "View Project" on any project card to verify the page opens at the top instantly. Awaiting user confirmation of test result.

## Pending Tasks
1. ✅ Audit and fix Hero.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
2. ✅ Audit and fix About.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
3. ✅ Audit and fix Services.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
4. ✅ Audit and fix Experience.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
5. ✅ Audit and fix Portfolio.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
6. ✅ Audit and fix Contact.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
7. ✅ Audit and fix Footer.css mobile responsiveness — COMPLETED
8. ✅ Audit and fix index.css / global styles — COMPLETED
9. ✅ Fix Download CV button text + icon color to white in About.css — COMPLETED
10. ✅ Fix Navbar hamburger menu: solid background applied — COMPLETED
11. ✅ Fix Navbar hamburger menu: add close (×) button inside mobile menu drawer — COMPLETED
12. ✅ Fix ProjectDetail page scroll-to-top on navigation: ScrollToTop component added to App.jsx — COMPLETED
13. 🔄 Fix Hero section scroll-down arrow position: move it lower/down in Hero.css — IN PROGRESS
14. 🔄 Make ProjectDetail.css fully mobile responsive
15. 🔄 Update `src/pages/AllProjects.jsx` to render all 12 projects in 3-3-3-3 grid
16. 🔄 Update `src/pages/AllProjects.css` for 3-column grid layout + mobile responsive
17. 🔄 Verify/update `App.jsx` or main layout to include Footer import and usage if not already present
